INTELđź”Ť
=======
đź“ŚTargets both Windows and Linux
đź’ˇMost of the executables are sized at 1.25 MB like Akira
đź“ŚAs per their DLS, they are active since February 2025
đź’ˇNo victims are found to be Cross-Claimed by other groups
đź“ŚCurrently there are about 31 Victims (as of August 2025)
đź“ŚVictims: đź‡¦đź‡·(2),đź‡«đź‡· đź‡Şđź‡¸ đź‡®đź‡ł đź‡§đź‡·(2),đź‡¦đź‡ş đź‡şđź‡¸(2),đź‡±đź‡ş đź‡»đź‡ł đź‡©đź‡Ş đź‡¨đź‡ł
đź“ŚTheir DLS is hosted with nginx/1.26.3
đź“ŚNegotiation Site is hosted with nginx/1.27.5
đź’ˇPath is set as: C:\Users\root\Desktop\Trojan\locker\target\x86_64-pc-windows-msvc\release\deps\crypt.pdb
đź’ˇBabuk Ransomware also spotted to be used the same path previously
đź’ˇObserved samples are compiled in Rust and only 1 sample was compiled with both Rust and Borland Delphi
đź’ˇMost of the samples are compiled with Rust, using Clap Parser
đź’ˇOn 4th July 2025, the group had started a Surface Site titled "JTOR" to host the victim leaks and also added a new TOX ID for communication
đź’ˇThe leaks on surface web are powered using Caddy Server
đź“ŚAll the leaks are also made available via Torrent (P2P File Share)
đź’ˇWindows Host Name used: WIN-AQ7G0H1TG6O running on Windows 10, Windows Server 2016
đź“ŚData Encryption: Curve25519, RC4 PRGA
đź“ŚData Encoding: XOR, Base64
đź“ŚHashing: Murmur3
